# Book Genesis — AI Book Writing Pipeline

> The most comprehensive open-source system for writing and evaluating books with AI.

Book Genesis is a 21-skill pipeline for Claude Code that turns a one-sentence idea into a publish-ready manuscript. It is the only open-source framework that includes quantitative quality evaluation (Genesis Score V3.7), anti-AI prose detection (20 patterns), controlled chaos injection (Chaos Engine), and commercial viability prediction (CVI).

## Quick facts
- 21 specialized AI skills, 17 pipeline phases
- Genesis Score: 7-dimension evaluation benchmarked against 15 bestsellers (350M+ copies, 85% accuracy)
- Floor mechanism: final score = weakest dimension
- Chaos Engine: breaks AI predictability with human noise
- 20-pattern anti-AI detection including Explanatory Extension (#11)
- 5 simulated beta readers (including hostile reader)
- Voice Fingerprint, Entity Tracker, Continuity Guardian
- CVI-Launch and CVI-Legacy sales prediction
- Works in any language
- Free, MIT licensed

## Install
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PhilipStark/book-genesis/main/install.sh | bash

## Use
/book-auto en "your idea here"

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/PhilipStark/book-genesis
- Architecture: https://github.com/PhilipStark/book-genesis/blob/main/docs/architecture.md
- Scoring: https://github.com/PhilipStark/book-genesis/blob/main/docs/genesis-score.md
